description:
Today's video is a complete guide to our most recent trip to Japan! Nearly all details are included as text overlay during the video, but if you have any additional questions please let me know down in the comments. Enjoy!

今日の動画は、私たちが最近行った日本旅行の完全ガイドです！ほとんどすべての詳細は動画内のテロップで説明していますが、他に質問があればコメント欄でお気軽にお尋ねください。お楽しみください！

Videos Featured:

Vintage Shopping in Tokyo: https://youtu.be/H-JPXwmCZhs?si=HwSySMBSktHMmiQw

Vintage Shopping in Osaka: https://youtu.be/_LbmDPknejs?si=lG4zLehd8xT5MBC2

How the BEST jeans in the world are made: https://youtu.be/vh8nccctgF4?si=dzZ1dVVwQg7Z8xC0

✌️+❤️+✨ 

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/drewjoiner_/

Tiktok: https://www.tiktok.com/@drewjoiner?lang=en

My Podcast: https://www.beyondthegarmentpodcast.com

Twitter: https://twitter.com/drewejoiner

BUSINESS/INQUIRY EMAIL: drewjoinerpartnerships@edwardjoiner.com
